preservedBehaviors: useRegisterFamilyRoot posts to /api/admin/state-parser/register-root
useRegisterFamilyRoot invalidates state-parser-registry query key on success
useRegisterFamilyRoot throws on failed response
useRegisterFamilyRoot always sets family_root to true in body
register-root route requires admin session
register-root route validates 2-letter state code
register-root route requires url
register-root route does upsert by jurisdiction_code and source_key or source_url
register-root route always forces family_root = true, parent_source_id = NULL, source_depth = 0 on update
SourcesPanel resets local state when state changes
DiscoverySection infers family key from url/name
DiscoverySection defaults discover mode to html_index for non-pdf
discover route validates root_source_id
discover route handles NJ and CA states specifically
useRegisterFamilyRoot has KNOWN_DISCOVER_MODES set with html_directory and pdf_directory (theirs)
useRegisterFamilyRoot has normalizeDiscoverMode function (theirs)
useRegisterFamilyRoot returns useMutation directly (theirs)
useRegisterFamilyRoot uses source_class default authoritative (theirs)
useRegisterFamilyRoot uses optional chaining on registryQuery refetch (theirs)
SourcesTable priority th has min-w-[110px] (theirs)
SourcesPanel uses rootNeedles naming (theirs)
SourcesPanel uses rootSet with early return shortcut (theirs)
DiscoverySection imports DISCOVERY_STRATEGY_OPTIONS, RULE_SOURCE_FAMILY_VALUES, getPatternOptionsForSourceClass (theirs)
DiscoverySection has Family/Discover/Pattern select dropdowns (theirs UI)
DiscoverySection disables root registration for PDF sources (theirs)
register-root route has KNOWN_DISCOVER_MODES set (theirs)
register-root route has normalizeDiscoverMode function (theirs)
register-root route has normalizeUrl function that strips trailing slash (theirs)
register-root route has loadRowById function (theirs)
register-root route returns row data on insert/update (theirs)
register-root route sets parser_strategy to state_parser_v1 on insert (theirs)
discover route uses Boolean(hit?.id) for already_registered (theirs)
discover route uses Boolean(hit?.family_root) for already_root (theirs)
useRegisterFamilyRoot validates url is not empty before sending (ours)
useRegisterFamilyRoot resolves preferred_pattern from multiple fallbacks (ours)
useRegisterFamilyRoot reads authority from payload?.authority fallback (ours)
DiscoverySection inferFamilyKey includes standard check (theirs)
